zh.lifeSummary: 當Christine Munro of Assynt, latterly Applecross and Coul於1574年出生在蘇格蘭薩瑟蘭阿希特時，她的父親Major Hector Munro of Assynt - 2nd of Assynt25歲，母親Isabel-nic-James Dunbar of Tarbat25歲。她於從大約1615年到1617年與Alexander Mackenzie of Kintail - progenitor of Coul and Applecross結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1647年享年73歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭希倫德福特洛斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Christine Munro of Assynt, latterly Applecross and Coul于1574年出生在苏格兰薩瑟蘭阿希特时，她的父亲Major Hector Munro of Assynt - 2nd of Assynt25岁，母亲Isabel-nic-James Dunbar of Tarbat25岁。她于从大约1615年到1617年与Alexander Mackenzie of Kintail - progenitor of Coul and Applecross结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1647年享年73岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰希倫德福特洛斯。

nameMeanings.name: Munro
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: nickname from Gaelic Rothach ‘man from Ro’. According to tradition which may be substantially correct, the ancestors of the Munros came from Ireland, from the foot of the river Roe in Derry, whence the name Bun-rotha, giving Mun-rotha by eclipsis of b after the preposition in’. See also Monroe , compare Munroe .
History: This (see 1 above) is the name of a Scottish clan with an ancestral seat at Foulis Castle, near Evanton, Ross-shire.

variants.name: Mulroy
meanings: Irish (Mayo): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Maolruaidh ‘descendant of Maolruadh’, a personal name composed of the elements maol ‘chief’ + ruadh ‘red’, i.e. ‘red-haired chieftain’. This surname, from has sometimes been changed to Munroe (see Munro ).

variants.name: Monroe
meanings: History: Scottish bearers of this name are descended from Donald O’Kane, who in the 11th century migrated from the mouth of the Roe to Ferrindonald in Cromarty, Scotland. There his descendants, as barons of Foulis and vassals of the earls of Ross, held lands along the Firth of Cromarty. James Monroe (1758–1831), 5th president of the US (1817–25), came from a cadet branch of this family.

variants.name: Munroe
meanings: Scottish and Irish: variant of   Munro  .

nameMeanings.name: Christine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Christina .  It was popular in the medieval period, when it appears to have been used interchangeably with   Christian  , and again in Britain at the end of the 19th century. In the United States it was particularly popular from the 1950s to the 1970s.

variants.name: Christeen
meanings: form of   Christina .  It was popular in the medieval period, when it appears to have been used interchangeably with   Christian  , and again in Britain at the end of the 19th century. In the United States it was particularly popular from the 1950s to the 1970s.

en.lifeSummary: When Christine Munro of Assynt, latterly Applecross and Coul was born in 1574, in Assynt, Sutherland, Scotland, her father, Major Hector Munro of Assynt - 2nd of Assynt, was 25 and her mother, Isabel-nic-James Dunbar of Tarbat, was 25. She married Alexander Mackenzie of Kintail - progenitor of Coul and Applecross from about 1615 to 1617. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1647, at the age of 73, and was buried in Fortrose, Highland, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Christine Munro of Assynt, latterly Applecross and Coul est née en 1574, à Assynt, Sutherland, Écosse, son père, Major Hector Munro of Assynt - 2nd of Assynt, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Isabel-nic-James Dunbar of Tarbat, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Alexander Mackenzie of Kintail - progenitor of Coul and Applecross du environ 1615 au 1617. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1647, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterrée à Fortrose, Highland, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.Inveran, Ross Cromarty, Scotland: Ross and Cromarty, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Christine Munro of Assynt, latterly Applecross and Coul 1574 in Assynt, Sutherland, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Major Hector Munro of Assynt - 2nd of Assynt 25 und ihre Mutter Isabel-nic-James Dunbar of Tarbat 25. Sie hat von um 1615 bis 1617 Alexander Mackenzie of Kintail - progenitor of Coul and Applecross geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1647 im Alter von 73 Jahren und wurde in Fortrose, Highland, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Christine Munro of Assynt, latterly Applecross and Coul è nata il nel 1574 nel Assynt, Sutherland, Scotland, sua padre, Major Hector Munro of Assynt - 2nd of Assynt, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Isabel-nic-James Dunbar of Tarbat, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Alexander Mackenzie of Kintail - progenitor of Coul and Applecross da circa 1615 a 1617. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1647, all'età di 73 anni, e fu sepolta a Fortrose, Highland, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Christine Munro of Assynt, latterly Applecross and Coulが1574年にスコットランドススエルランドアシントで生まれた時，父Major Hector Munro of Assynt - 2nd of Assyntは25歳，母Isabel-nic-James Dunbar of Tarbatは25歳であった。から約1615年まで1617年にAlexander Mackenzie of Kintail - progenitor of Coul and Applecrossと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1647年に73歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドヒグhランドフォートローゼにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Christine Munro of Assynt, latterly Applecross and Coul(이)가 1574년 스컷랜드 서덜랜드 아시트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Major Hector Munro of Assynt - 2nd of Assynt(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel-nic-James Dunbar of Tarbat(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 대략 1615년 부터 1617년 까지 Alexander Mackenzie of Kintail - progenitor of Coul and Applecross(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1647년 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 히그h랜드 포트로즈에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Christine Munro of Assynt, latterly Applecross and Coul nasceu em 1574, em Assynt, Sutherland, Scotland, seu pai, Major Hector Munro of Assynt - 2nd of Assynt, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Isabel-nic-James Dunbar of Tarbat, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Alexander Mackenzie of Kintail - progenitor of Coul and Applecross de aproximadamente 1615 a 1617. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1647, com 73 anos, e foi sepultada em Fortrose, Highland, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Christine Munro of Assynt, latterly Applecross and Coul родилась в 1574 г. в местности ассинт, сутирланд, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Major Hector Munro of Assynt - 2nd of Assynt было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel-nic-James Dunbar of Tarbat, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Alexander Mackenzie of Kintail - progenitor of Coul and Applecross с около 1615 по 1617. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1647 г. в возрасте 73 лет и была похоронена в местности фортрос, хаиланд, Шотландия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Alexander Mackenzie of Kintail - progenitor of Coul and Applecross desde aproximadamente 1615 hasta 1617. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija.
